roles.title: Data Analyst Intern
bullets: Built Power BI dashboard tracking 12 KPIs across 3 production lines, reducing report generation time by 4 hours/week
Wrote SQL queries joining 5 tables to identify defect patterns, uncovering $200K annual waste in rework costs
Automated weekly reporting pipeline in Python (pandas + openpyxl), saving 6 hours of manual work monthly
Presented findings to 8 senior stakeholders, influencing procurement strategy for Q3 supplier contracts

roles.title: Data Science Intern
bullets: Developed customer churn prediction model (XGBoost) achieving 87% accuracy on 50K user dataset
Built feature engineering pipeline reducing model training time by 40% via vectorized transformations
Created A/B test analysis framework in Python used by 3 product teams for experiment evaluation
Deployed model via FastAPI endpoint handling 500+ daily predictions in production

projects.name: ATS CV Builder
projects.description: AI-powered CV generation tool that tailors resumes to job descriptions
bullets: Built end-to-end NLP pipeline using sentence-transformers for semantic job-CV matching
Integrated Ollama LLM to rewrite CV bullets with impact-driven language automatically
Designed Streamlit UI with PDF export, used by 50+ beta testers

projects.name: Berlin Startup Job Market Dashboard
projects.description: Web scraper + dashboard tracking 500+ Berlin startup job postings weekly
bullets: Scraped 500+ job listings from 50 Berlin startup career pages using BeautifulSoup + requests
Built interactive Tableau dashboard showing hiring trends by role, seniority, and tech stack
Automated weekly data refresh via GitHub Actions cron job

achievements: 1st Place, TU Berlin Data Science Hackathon 2023 — built demand forecasting model in 24h
certifications: Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst Associate (2024)
